name: HELIOS 1600W diode laser
shortDescription: 1600W professional diode laser with 4 wavelengths and 5 adjustable sapphire spot sizes. Top-tier performance for clinical-grade applications.
description: The HELIOS diode laser is named after the sun god of Greek mythology – who brings light every day, sees everything, and from whom nothing remains hidden. That is exactly what the device represents: power, light and uncompromising precision. With 1600W output power, 4 wavelengths (755/808/940/1064 nm) and a sapphire spot adjustable in 5 sizes, it belongs to the top segment of the market.
metaTitle: HELIOS 1600W diode laser | 4 wavelengths, adjustable spot size
metaDescription: HELIOS – 1600W top-tier diode laser with 4 wavelengths, 5 adjustable sapphire spot sizes and multi-stage cooling. Clinical-grade professional hair removal.

videoDescription.headline: HELIOS – the true power of light
paragraphs: The HELIOS 1600W diode laser is not an entry-level or compromise solution. It is a system in which the key parameters are already maximised: high power for fast work, 4 wavelengths for full coverage and an adjustable spot size for precision and efficiency.
Such a configuration is particularly rare in Europe. Just as Helios never asked whether he brought enough light into the world – this device works unstoppably, quietly yet effectively.

afterVideo.text: Do you have questions about HELIOS? We are happy to help!

afterFeatures.headline: Would you like to see HELIOS live?
afterFeatures.subtitle: Visit our showroom in Érd and try it out in person!

final.headline: Interested in the HELIOS 1600W diode laser?
final.subtitle: Request a free consultation and we will help you decide whether this is the best choice for you.

featureRows.headline: Why choose HELIOS?
featureRows.subtitle: 1600W output power, 4 wavelengths, adjustable sapphire spot size – top-tier hair removal.

features.title: 1600W – top-tier performance
features.description:
On the market, 600-800W devices represent the entry/average category, 1000-1200W systems the strong category, while 1600W is already the premium segment. The high power penetrates deeper into the hair follicle, delivers energy more efficiently and works faster.

What this means in practice:

Faster visible results
Fewer repetitions needed
Clients satisfied sooner
More stable, predictable operation

features.title: 4 wavelengths – for every skin and hair type
features.description:
The combination of four different wavelengths (755 / 808 / 940 / 1064 nm) provides broad treatment flexibility in a single device.
755 nm – light, fine hairs
808 nm – universal, gold standard
940 nm – darker skin tones
1064 nm – deep hair follicles

features.title: Sapphire spot size adjustable in 5 sizes
features.description: The sapphire crystal handpiece can be adjusted in 5 sizes, so the treatment parameters can be precisely matched to the area being treated. A smaller spot size for precise, targeted treatments (face, underarms), a larger spot size for fast work on large surfaces (legs, back). The adjustable spot size optimises energy distribution and reduces treatment time.
features.highlight: One device, 5 different spot sizes – ideal for every body area.

features.title: Multi-stage industrial cooling system
features.description: HELIOS uses a complex, industrial-grade cooling system based on a combination of TEC (semiconductor cooling), water cooling and air heat dissipation. This three-level solution keeps the internal components at a stable temperature even during continuous use and cools the skin surface in a controlled manner during treatments.

features.title: Sapphire contact cooling – targeted skin protection
features.description: The genuine sapphire crystal in the handpiece provides direct contact cooling on the skin surface, reaching close to -16°C. This reduces the unpleasant heat sensation, protects the epidermis and enables more even energy transfer. The real advantage of the system lies in precise controllability and stable operation – not in extreme values.
features.highlight: Efficiency, control and comfort all at once.

training.headline: Operator training – part of the purchase
training.intro: The price of the HELIOS device includes comprehensive operator training. The aim of the training is to ensure that you can use the machine confidently and professionally from your very first clients.
items: Operating principle and safety considerations of the device
Use of the interface, parameter settings
Optimal settings by skin and hair type
Proper use of the 5 spot sizes for different body areas
closingParagraphs: Live model practical training with your own model +59,990 Ft – particularly recommended for those who want to master the practical steps and treatment protocols in a real treatment situation under supervision.
Basic operator training is free with the purchase of the device, and we issue a FAR certificate (Hungarian adult-education certification) upon successful completion.
training.freeText: Basic training is FREE with the purchase of the device!

expertQuote.quote: With its 1600W output power and the sapphire handpiece adjustable in 5 sizes, HELIOS belongs to the top segment of the market. Such a configuration is particularly rare in Europe – most devices on the market have lower power, fewer wavelengths and a fixed or limited spot size.
expertQuote.author: Horváth László

faq.question: What does 1600W of power mean in practice?
faq.answer: On the market, 600-800W devices represent the entry category and 1000-1200W systems the strong category. 1600W is already the top segment: faster treatment time, deeper penetration into the hair follicle, fewer repetitions needed. It is particularly cost-effective in high-traffic salons and clinics.

faq.question: What does the spot size adjustable in 5 sizes mean?
faq.answer: The sapphire handpiece can be adjusted to 5 different sizes, so it can be precisely matched to the body area concerned. A smaller spot size for precise treatment of the face, underarms and bikini area, a larger spot size for fast treatment of legs, back and chest.

faq.question: How does the multi-stage cooling system work?
faq.answer: TEC semiconductor cooling in the handpiece, a closed water circuit to dissipate heat, and air assistance to support heat dissipation. This combination ensures that the device delivers consistent performance even during longer treatments, without overheating – even with intensive, all-day use.

faq.question: How quickly does it pay for itself?
faq.answer: On average, a client purchases treatments worth about 50,000 Ft (a treatment series or a combination of several areas). With just 20 clients, around 1,000,000 Ft in revenue can be realised. The high power and short treatment time make it possible to keep the device continuously utilised, so it can pay for itself within a few months.

faq.question: What is included in the price?
faq.answer: The 2,999,990 Ft includes comprehensive operator training, FAR certificate (Hungarian adult-education certification), 2-year warranty, as well as the Hungarian-language user manual and treatment protocols. Delivery time is 2-6 weeks.

faq.question: Is there live model practical training?
faq.answer: Yes, available for +59,990 Ft. You provide your own model and can master the practical steps and treatment protocols in a real treatment situation under supervision.

whatsIncluded: Sapphire crystal handpiece adjustable in 5 sizes
